languages.text: Пускай малатековская ересь изобретения, в особенности с использованием ксенотеха, и грозит анафемой ликвидации от Адептус Механикус — не меньшую она сулит и прибыль. Запустив тайные манофакторумы по производству бионических рук, найденных на Заркове, династия может значительно обогатиться — не говоря уж о том, что хладные торговцы обрадуются новинке на рынке.

traits.locale_text: Пускай малатековская ересь изобретения, в особенности с использованием ксенотеха, и грозит анафемой ликвидации от Адептус Механикус — не меньшую она сулит и прибыль. Запустив тайные манофакторумы по производству бионических рук, найденных на Заркове, династия может значительно обогатиться — не говоря уж о том, что хладные торговцы обрадуются новинке на рынке.

languages.text: Запустив тайные мануфакторумы по производству бионических рук, найденных на Заркове, династия может значительно обогатиться — не говоря уж о том, что хладные торговцы наверняка заинтересуются имплантом. Пускай ересь изобретения, в особенности с использованием ксенотеха, и грозит анафемой от Адептус Механикус — прибыль, которую она сулит, не меньше.

By operating secret manufactorums to produce the bionic hands found on Zarkov, the dynasty can greatly enrich itself — not to mention the fact that Cold Traders will surely be interested in said implant. The heresy of innovation carries great risks, and innovation involving xenotech, even more so, such as the dynasty being declared anathema by the Adeptus Mechanicus — but the potential profits are just as great.
languages.original_text: Запустив тайные мануфакторумы по производству бионических рук, найденных на Заркове, династия может значительно обогатиться — не говоря уж о том, что хладные торговцы наверняка заинтересуются имплантом. Пускай ересь изобретения, в особенности с использованием ксенотеха, и грозит анафемой от Адептус Механикус — прибыль, которую она сулит, не меньше.

traits.locale_text: By operating secret manufactorums to produce the bionic hands found on Zarkov, the dynasty can greatly enrich itself — not to mention the fact that Cold Traders will surely be interested in said implant. The heresy of innovation carries great risks, and innovation involving xenotech, even more so, such as the dynasty being declared anathema by the Adeptus Mechanicus — but the potential profits are just as great.

By operating secret manufactorums to produce the bionic hands found on Zarkov, the dynasty can greatly enrich itself — not to mention the fact that Cold Traders will surely be interested in said implant. The malatek heresy of innovation carries great risks, and innovation involving xenotech, even more so, such as the dynasty being declared anathema by the Adeptus Mechanicus — but the potential profits are just as great.

By operating secret manufactorums to produce the bionic hands found on Zarkov, the dynasty can greatly enrich itself — not to mention the fact that Cold Traders will surely be interested in said implant. The malatek heresy of innovation carries great risks, and innovation involving xenotech, even more so, such as the dynasty being declared anathema by the Adeptus Mechanicus — but the potential profits are just as great.

By operating secret manufactorums to produce the bionic hands found on Zarkov, the dynasty can greatly enrich itself — not to mention the fact that Cold Traders will surely be interested in said implant. The heresy of innovation carries great risks, and innovation involving xenotech, even more so, such as the dynasty being declared anathema by the Adeptus Mechanicus — but the potential profits are just as great.

languages.text: En exploitant des manufactorums secrets pour produire les mains bioniques trouvées sur Zarkov, la dynastie pourra s'enrichir considérablement, d'autant plus que ces implants ne manqueront pas d'intéresser les adeptes du Commerce Froid. Cependant, l'hérésie de l'innovation comporte de grands risques, surtout lorsqu'elle est liée à la xénotechnologie. L'Adeptus Mechanicus pourrait jeter l'anathème sur la dynastie, mais les bénéfices potentiels sont tout aussi grands.
languages.original_text: By operating secret manufactorums to produce the bionic hands found on Zarkov, the dynasty can greatly enrich itself — not to mention the fact that Cold Traders will surely be interested in said implant. The heresy of innovation carries great risks, and innovation involving xenotech, even more so, such as the dynasty being declared anathema by the Adeptus Mechanicus — but the potential profits are just as great.

traits.locale_text: En exploitant des manufactorums secrets pour produire les mains bioniques trouvées sur Zarkov, la dynastie pourra s'enrichir considérablement, d'autant plus que ces implants ne manqueront pas d'intéresser les adeptes du Commerce Froid. Cependant, l'hérésie de l'innovation comporte de grands risques, surtout lorsqu'elle est liée à la xénotechnologie. L'Adeptus Mechanicus pourrait jeter l'anathème sur la dynastie, mais les bénéfices potentiels sont tout aussi grands.

languages.text: La dinastía puede llenar sus arcas destinando manufactorums secretos a la fabricación de las manos biónicas descubiertas en Zarkov, por no mencionar el interés que muchos comerciantes fríos mostrarían en tales implantes. La innovación es una herejía que conlleva riesgos desmedidos, y la innovación nacida de la xenotecnología es posiblemente la peor de todas; el Adeptus Mechanicus podría llegar a anatemizar a toda la dinastía. Pero los beneficios potenciales son igualmente considerables.
languages.original_text: By operating secret manufactorums to produce the bionic hands found on Zarkov, the dynasty can greatly enrich itself — not to mention the fact that Cold Traders will surely be interested in said implant. The heresy of innovation carries great risks, and innovation involving xenotech, even more so, such as the dynasty being declared anathema by the Adeptus Mechanicus — but the potential profits are just as great.

traits.locale_text: La dinastía puede llenar sus arcas destinando manufactorums secretos a la fabricación de las manos biónicas descubiertas en Zarkov, por no mencionar el interés que muchos comerciantes fríos mostrarían en tales implantes. La innovación es una herejía que conlleva riesgos desmedidos, y la innovación nacida de la xenotecnología es posiblemente la peor de todas; el Adeptus Mechanicus podría llegar a anatemizar a toda la dinastía. Pero los beneficios potenciales son igualmente considerables.

languages.text: 通过运作秘密制造厂，生产扎尔科夫的那种仿生手，王朝能极大地充盈金库——那些冷市商人对此类植入物定会趋之若鹜。异端创新暗含着巨大风险，而涉及异形科技的革新则风险更大，王朝很可能因此被机械修会定性为异端……但潜在的收益也同样惊人。
languages.original_text: By operating secret manufactorums to produce the bionic hands found on Zarkov, the dynasty can greatly enrich itself — not to mention the fact that Cold Traders will surely be interested in said implant. The heresy of innovation carries great risks, and innovation involving xenotech, even more so, such as the dynasty being declared anathema by the Adeptus Mechanicus — but the potential profits are just as great.

traits.locale_text: 通过运作秘密制造厂，生产扎尔科夫的那种仿生手，王朝能极大地充盈金库——那些冷市商人对此类植入物定会趋之若鹜。异端创新暗含着巨大风险，而涉及异形科技的革新则风险更大，王朝很可能因此被机械修会定性为异端……但潜在的收益也同样惊人。

languages.text: Durch den Betrieb geheimer Manufactorien für die Produktion der auf Zarkov gefundenen bionischen Hände kann sich die Dynastie enorm bereichern ... zumal sich auch Kalthändler sehr für besagte Implantate interessieren dürften. Die Ketzerei der Innovation selbst und mit Xenotech verbundene Innovationen bergen enorme Risiken. Das Adeptus Mechanicus könnte die Dynastie beispielsweise zum Anathema erklären ... aber die Profite sind einfach zu verlockend.
languages.original_text: By operating secret manufactorums to produce the bionic hands found on Zarkov, the dynasty can greatly enrich itself — not to mention the fact that Cold Traders will surely be interested in said implant. The heresy of innovation carries great risks, and innovation involving xenotech, even more so, such as the dynasty being declared anathema by the Adeptus Mechanicus — but the potential profits are just as great.

traits.locale_text: Durch den Betrieb geheimer Manufactorien für die Produktion der auf Zarkov gefundenen bionischen Hände kann sich die Dynastie enorm bereichern ... zumal sich auch Kalthändler sehr für besagte Implantate interessieren dürften. Die Ketzerei der Innovation selbst und mit Xenotech verbundene Innovationen bergen enorme Risiken. Das Adeptus Mechanicus könnte die Dynastie beispielsweise zum Anathema erklären ... aber die Profite sind einfach zu verlockend.

languages.text: Hanedanlık, Zarkov'da bulunan biyonik elleri üretmek için gizli imalathaneler işleterek servetine servet katabilir... Soğuk Tacirlerin söz konusu implanta kesinlikle ilgi duyacağı gerçeğinden bahsetmeye bile gerek yok. Yenilikçilik kâfirliği büyük riskler taşır. Hele ki zeno teknolojisi içeren yenilikler, hanedanlığın Adeptus Mechanicus tarafından aforoz edilmesi gibi daha da büyük risklere yol açabilir. Ancak potansiyel kâr da bir o kadar büyüktür.
languages.original_text: By operating secret manufactorums to produce the bionic hands found on Zarkov, the dynasty can greatly enrich itself — not to mention the fact that Cold Traders will surely be interested in said implant. The heresy of innovation carries great risks, and innovation involving xenotech, even more so, such as the dynasty being declared anathema by the Adeptus Mechanicus — but the potential profits are just as great.

traits.locale_text: Hanedanlık, Zarkov'da bulunan biyonik elleri üretmek için gizli imalathaneler işleterek servetine servet katabilir... Soğuk Tacirlerin söz konusu implanta kesinlikle ilgi duyacağı gerçeğinden bahsetmeye bile gerek yok. Yenilikçilik kâfirliği büyük riskler taşır. Hele ki zeno teknolojisi içeren yenilikler, hanedanlığın Adeptus Mechanicus tarafından aforoz edilmesi gibi daha da büyük risklere yol açabilir. Ancak potansiyel kâr da bir o kadar büyüktür.

languages.text: ザルコフの義手を作る秘密の工場を稼働させることで、その王朝は莫大な富を得る事ができる。冷酷な商人たちは、義手に関心を持つ事だろう。革新のマルテックの異端は大きなリスクを伴う。特に異種技術に関わる革新は、機械神聖の宣告による異端の烙印を押されるリスクも伴う。しかし、その潜在的な利益は、それと同じくらい大きい。
languages.original_text: By operating secret manufactorums to produce the bionic hands found on Zarkov, the dynasty can greatly enrich itself — not to mention the fact that Cold Traders will surely be interested in said implant. The malatek heresy of innovation carries great risks, and innovation involving xenotech, even more so, such as the dynasty being declared anathema by the Adeptus Mechanicus — but the potential profits are just as great.
